items.name_en: Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm
items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Dior CEST Monogram Bucket Bag. Elegant and classic, with blue oblique monogram fabric, the unique bucket shape looks like a money bag!
Features a rotating D-letter opening CD lock; tightening the opening ensures high security, while loosening it gives a casual, lazy feel. Both the short and long shoulder straps are adjustable and detachable. The rigid base gives it a more three-dimensional look, maximizing the atmosphere!
Mainly achieving bag freedom, sisters, go for it!

specs.rawTitle:
Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm

items.name_en: Dimensions: 25×15×5 cm
items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 25×15×5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Shipment! 2024 Latest LV Pea Bean Mother & Child Bag, fashion is a cycle, a style from 20 years ago has been re-released. This design point: one shoulder strap solves the need, can be crossbody or underarm, changing carrying methods anytime and anywhere, suitable for more occasions! Simple and convenient!
The side design adds fashion sense while being practical, paying tribute to LV's classic travel trunk! The special padded wide leather adds comfort to the shoulder and a relaxed casual feel! Suitable for daily commute or travel. Plus, the capacity of this bag is not to be underestimated, it is sure to turn heads 🥰

items.name_en: Dio Lady Matte Blue 17cm
items.name_cn:
Dio Lady Matte Blue 17cm
Model: 6603
Classic and timeless, the matte finish is a must-have for early spring and early summer.
Pair it with fresh blue jeans this summer and you'll be the trendiest on the street!
Pure blue exudes a French lazy fairy vibe, clean and pure yet creative.
Can be sweet, cool, or ethereal.
Compared to Dior's previous glossy and lambskin versions, the matte calfskin is more durable and less prone to scratches.
Notably, the chain is the same color as the bag body, making it very eye-catching.
Three-compartment mini size with enough daily capacity, it won't dig into your hand.
A highly cost-effective entry-level luxury bag.
Dimensions: 17*7.5*14

items.name_en: DIOR ❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [Large Brown]
items.name_cn:
DIOR ❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [Large Brown]
This Dior Toujours handbag made a stunning appearance at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a casual and practical design. Crafted from brown calfskin, it is detailed with oversized woven stitching. The spacious interior compartments with a small pocket keep daily essentials neatly organized. It features a leather strap closure for secure storage and a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure with adjustable sides to elevate the style. The large size features a leather handle with adjustable details, allowing for hand or shoulder carrying.
CD Lock and strap closure
D.I.O.R. charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2823
Size: 37 x 20 x 28.5 cm
Handle length: 14 - 29 cm. 000820

items.name_en: DIOR 🫥 BOBBY EAST-WEST Chain Bag 'Oblique + Small Bag'
items.name_cn:
DIOR 🫥 BOBBY EAST-WEST Chain Bag 'Oblique + Small Bag'
This Dior ❤ Bobby East-West Chain Bag is a Summer 2023 new arrival, crafted with blue Oblique print fabric, fashionable and elegant. The flap is adorned with a decorative CD buckle to elevate the style, and the practical compartment contains a small detachable zip pocket. With a detachable chain, it can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or as a clutch.
Flap closure
Decorative CD buckle on front
6 card slots
1 slip pocket
1 small detachable zip pocket
Detachable chain shoulder strap
Can be paired with this season's signature shoulder strap and thin shoulder strap
Model: 5703
Size: 21.5×12×4cm

items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Authentic Counter Top Imported Original Sheepskin Backpack, Medium Dior Caro Backpack Black Sheepskin Oversized Houndstooth
items.name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Authentic Counter Top Imported Original Sheepskin Backpack, Medium Dior Caro Backpack Black Sheepskin Oversized Houndstooth
Product Info
This Dior Caro Backpack is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Collection, showcasing a fashionable and elegant style. Crafted from black sheepskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting for a touch of class. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD logo. Inside, there is a spacious drawstring main compartment, and two small flap pockets for various daily essentials. The medium size comes with gold-finish handles and an adjustable shoulder strap for added comfort.
Main: Sheepskin, Lining: Cowhide
Front features CD logo flap and drawstring closure
Dimensions: 23×26.7×12.5cm
Style No.: 6301

items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-Grade Imported Factory Embroidered Shopping Bag 26cm ✨
items.name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-Grade Imported Factory Embroidered Shopping Bag 26cm ✨
This Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. The white style is fully embellished with a multicolor Butterfly Around The World pattern embroidery, highlighting the classic butterfly beauty of the series, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles, and can hold various daily items. The medium size features a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder. 8002
Size: 26.5 x 21 x 14cm,📸 Exclusive real-life photos 🎞✨

items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-Grade Imported Factory Embroidery (D-Journey) Monogram Fabric. This D-Journey Handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the Dior 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear show. It features a soft texture and a modern reinterpretation of the dumpling bag silhouette. Crafted from blue denim calfskin, it is accented with flat oversized diagonal quilting, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern. The main compartment features a zip pocket, and two side pockets with large leather zip pulls, each adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo, making it easy to store various small daily items. The small size comes with an adjustable top handle and leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand carrying, shoulder carrying, or crossbody wear, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.

 This Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. The white style is fully embellished with a multicolor Butterfly Around The World pattern embroidery, highlighting the classic beauty of the series, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles, and can hold various daily items. The medium style features a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder. 8001
Dimensions: 36 x 27.5 x 16.5cm,📸 exclusive real-life photos 🎞
